text:
Class: A
Tier: T1
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: CISO awareness notification required. DPA executed before implementation begins.

Class: A
Tier: T2
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: VP+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: CISO awareness required. DPA executed before implementation. ERP integration tier must be formally assigned per ISP-001 §12.2 before integration activity begins.

Class: A
Tier: T3
Approval Path: STANDARD — ENHANCED
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Sign-off
Legal / DPA Review: Required + GC Sign-off
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: VP + SVP
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: CISO and General Counsel must co-sign approval memo. DPA required. ERP tier assignment mandatory. Architecture review by IT Security before integration.

Class: A
Tier: T4
Approval Path: EXECUTIVE APPROVAL
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Sign-off
Legal / DPA Review: Required + GC Sign-off
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: EVP + CFO
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Full executive approval package required. Board notification if vendor will have persistent production system access. DPA required. Legal contract review mandatory.

Class: B
Tier: T1
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: CONDITIONAL
Required Approvals / Notes: DPA required if personal data in scope. Confirm data subject categories and legal basis before execution.

Class: B
Tier: T2
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: DPA required. SOC 2 Type II or ISO 27001 attestation required for vendors handling RESTRICTED data per ISP-001 §12.1.3. NDA must be confirmed executed before information exchange.

Class: B
Tier: T3
Approval Path: STANDARD — ENHANCED
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Awareness
Legal / DPA Review: Required + GC Awareness
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: VP+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: DPA required. Enhanced security review. VP business owner sign-off on data classification memo.

Class: B
Tier: T4
Approval Path: EXECUTIVE APPROVAL
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Sign-off
Legal / DPA Review: Required + GC Sign-off
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: EVP + CFO
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Executive approval package. DPA required. Legal contract review mandatory.

Class: C
Tier: T1
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
IT Security Review: Notification only
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: No DPA required. Standard NDA / confidentiality provisions apply. IT Security notification for any system integration, even if non-regulated.

Class: C
Tier: T2
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: CONDITIONAL
Required Approvals / Notes: No DPA required unless personal data is inadvertently in scope — confirm at intake. Standard NDA applies.

Class: C
Tier: T3
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: VP+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: IT Security review required despite non-regulated classification. VP sign-off required at T3 regardless of data scope.

Class: C
Tier: T4
Approval Path: EXECUTIVE APPROVAL
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Awareness
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: EVP
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Executive approval required. Legal must review at T4 regardless of data classification.

Class: D
Tier: T1
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Conditional
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: IT Security review required for all technology professional services where personnel will have system access. DPA required if personal data accessed.

Class: D
Tier: T2
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: DPA required if regulated data accessed. Background check requirements for personnel with RESTRICTED data access apply per ISP-001 §6.3.

Class: D
Tier: T3
Approval Path: STANDARD — ENHANCED
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Sign-off
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: VP+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: CISO sign-off on personnel access scope. DPA required. Enhanced ISP-001 §12 compliance verification.

Class: D
Tier: T4
Approval Path: EXECUTIVE APPROVAL
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Sign-off
Legal / DPA Review: Required + GC Sign-off
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: EVP + CFO
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Full executive package. All personnel with production access individually vetted by IT Security.

Class: E
Tier: T1
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
IT Security Review: Not required
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Standard NDA / confidentiality provisions apply. No system access; no data handling review required.

Class: E
Tier: T2
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
IT Security Review: Not required
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Standard NDA applies. Procurement confirms no system access and no regulated data in scope before streamlined path is confirmed.

Class: E
Tier: T3
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Notification only
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: VP+
Fast-Track Eligible?: CONDITIONAL
Required Approvals / Notes: VP sign-off required at T3 threshold regardless of engagement type.

Class: E
Tier: T4
Approval Path: EXECUTIVE APPROVAL
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: EVP
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Executive approval required at T4 regardless of engagement type.
